gold.rationale: 文本将零散的紧张局势信息与“未封锁”的表态，推演并改写成“已公布且落地执行”的完整收费与登检制度，并用伪装成“现场画面/通知截图”的配图把结论坐实；但文中未提供可核验的正式文件来源，且关键配图与其声称的时间、地点和“新规实施证据”之间存在明显语义与语境错配，因此整体给受众的主要印象偏向失实。

atoms: Image shows a grey naval warship at sea during twilight or night.
A missile is launching vertically from the ship, leaving a bright trail of fire and smoke.
A large semi-transparent grey text box is overlaid on the top left.
The overlay text reads: '霍尔木兹通行条件公布？航运成本急升'.
A watermark in the bottom right corner reads '图源：网络'.
Image is a satellite map of the Strait of Hormuz showing Iran and Oman.
Red arrows indicate 'MAIN EXPORT ROUTES (OIL/GAS)' and 'IMPORT ROUTES (GOODS)'.
A yellow circle marks a 'CHECKPOINT' and 'ESCORT ZONE'.
Text labels include 'IRAN', 'OMAN', and 'INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING LANE'.
A legend box in the bottom left shows flags of Iran and Oman.
Image is a low-resolution, grainy, monochrome photo.
A helicopter silhouette is visible in the upper left sky.
The silhouette of a large ship's superstructure is visible in the lower right.
The image quality suggests thermal imaging or a zoomed-in surveillance shot.
Image is a screenshot of a mobile phone interface showing a news article.
The title reads: '关于近期特定水域通航安全特别管理的临时规定'.
The text lists five points regarding ship inspections and fees.
The footer attributes the document to 'XX市海洋与渔业局' with a date of '202X年XX月XX日'.
The phone status bar shows time '15:30' and '5G' signal.
Image is a black and white photo of a fighter jet taking off.
The jet has an Iranian flag on its tail fin.
Text in the top left corner reads '资料图' (Reference Image).
A caption at the bottom reads: '本轮冲突升级后，伊朗随即公布海峡通行新规。'
Image is completely blank and white.
No visual content, text, or objects are visible.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A dramatic photo of a warship firing a missile at night. A large text overlay in Chinese asks about Hormuz passage conditions and rising costs. A source watermark is in the corner.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: ‘霍尔木兹通行条件公布？航运成本急升’ | 图源：网络
visible_overlays_annotations: Text box: '霍尔木兹通行条件公布？航运成本急升'
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image depicts military action, while the text overlay discusses economic consequences (shipping costs) of new regulations.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An infographic map of the Strait of Hormuz. It uses arrows and circles to illustrate shipping lanes, checkpoints, and escort zones between Iran and Oman.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: IRAN | OMAN | 国际航海通道 INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING LANE | 检查点 CHECKPOINT | 护航区域 ESCORT ZONE | 主要出口航线 (石油/天然气) MAIN EXPORT ROUTES (OIL/GAS) | 进口航线 (商品) IMPORT ROUTES (GOODS) | 战略重要性：全球能源供应的关键动脉

visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides a vague visual of naval/air activity, potentially illustrating the 'inspection' or 'surveillance' mentioned in the text.

cross_modal: image_1 is presented as visual evidence of the 'Hormuz passage conditions' and 'rising shipping costs' headline, showing a warship firing a missile.
image_2 is used as a map to illustrate the strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz and the location of the 'Checkpoint' and 'Escort Zone'.
image_3 is presented as 'on-site footage' of the IRGC Navy conducting inspections, showing a helicopter and a ship in low visibility.
image_4 is presented as a screenshot of an official notice detailing the 'temporary regulations' for passage, including fees and inspections.
image_5 is presented as evidence of the conflict escalation, showing an Iranian fighter jet with a caption about new regulations.
image_6 is a blank image included in the post but contains no visual information to bind to the text.

cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: '霍尔木兹通行条件公布？航运成本急升'
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The image depicts a military strike (likely US Navy) to illustrate the general theme of conflict and cost, but does not show the specific Iranian inspection procedures described in the text.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post implies this map shows the 'strategic importance' and the specific 'checkpoint' and 'escort zone' areas mentioned in the new regulations.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A satellite map of the Strait of Hormuz with English labels for 'Iran', 'Oman', 'International Shipping Lane', 'Checkpoint', and 'Escort Zone'.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The map visually supports the text's discussion of the geography and the specific zones (checkpoint/escort) where the new rules apply.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post presents this as 'on-site footage' of the IRGC Navy conducting inspections on March X.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A grainy, low-visibility image of a helicopter hovering near a large ship.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The image is vague but consistent with the text's claim of 'on-site' military presence and inspections, serving as visual proof of the 'IRGC Navy' activity.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post presents this as a screenshot of the 'temporary regulations' notice detailing passage conditions like fees and inspections.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A smartphone screenshot of a document titled 'Temporary Regulations on Special Management of Navigation Safety in Specific Water Areas', listing rules for reporting, inspections, and fees.
cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: 关于近期特定水域通航安全特别管理的临时规定
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides the specific textual evidence for the 'passage conditions' (Section I) described in the post, matching the claims about fees and inspections.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image to support the claim that 'Iran announced new strait passage regulations' following the escalation of conflict.

cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: '本轮冲突升级后，伊朗随即公布海峡通行新规。'
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The image visually links the military escalation (fighter jet) with the policy change (caption), supporting the text's narrative in Section IV about the conflict background.

cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The image contains no visual information and is not bound to any specific factual claim in the text.

retrieved_evidence.text: 网络与社交平台近期出现了署名为伊朗方面的“通知”文本，标题类似“关于霍尔木兹海峡过境船舶申报与检查的临时规定”，内容多围绕过峡前申报货物与航线、缴纳通行费、禁运特定货物、接受登检以及可申请护航等要点展开。据航运业人士介绍，这类呈现为官方通告或港口管理部门公告风格的文本，往往被视作判断伊朗是否已正式宣布并执行霍尔木兹“通行条件”的重要依据，也直接影响保险公司和船东对该海域风险等级的评估。
霍尔木兹海峡位于伊朗与阿曼之间，是连接波斯湾与阿曼湾、阿拉伯海的狭长水道，被认为掌握着全球原油与液化天然气海运的“咽喉”。根据公开的地理示意资料，主航道紧贴伊朗和阿曼海岸，两侧划定了进出双向通道和交通分离线。近年在伊朗提出对过境船舶实施申报、登检与收取通行费的主张后，关于在航道上设置检查点与护航路线的讨论增多，各国海军在周边海域的护航与监视活动亦趋频繁。
围绕霍尔木兹海峡局势的争论中，国际油轮与散货船在狭窄水道内排队通过的场合常被用以说明该通道的高密度交通状况。公开资料显示，每年经由这一海峡运输的原油和液化天然气量占全球海运能源贸易的相当比例，船只多在航运公司、保险机构和海军护航力量的协调下按既定航线通行。随着伊朗被指提出强制申报和登检要求，船舶在进入海峡前进行风险评估、调整航程与准备额外文件的工作量显著增加。
以色列与周边武装组织的冲突升级，经常伴随以军战机起飞、对叙利亚或加沙等地实施空袭的场景，被媒体用来说明地区安全形势恶化。近年来，每当导弹袭击、爆炸烟柱和空袭造成的基础设施破坏被报道时，国际分析人士便会将这种军事紧张与霍尔木兹海峡风险溢价联系起来。有评论据此推断，伊朗提出或强化对海峡过境船舶的“通行条件”，与其在区域博弈中试图通过能源通道施加压力的战略考量密切相关。
霍尔木兹海峡长期被视为全球最敏感的能源要道之一，伊朗多次表示有权在本国沿岸实施安全管控。近日有报道描述，在夜间海面上，伊朗海军及伊斯兰革命卫队海上力量出动军舰与快艇编队，在远处大型油轮穿越狭窄航道的背景下加强巡逻和盘查。相关场合被解读为伊朗宣布“通行条件”后展示执行意志的姿态，引发国际航运与能源市场对过峡通行规则和潜在对峙的高度关注。
美国、英国等国近年来在霍尔木兹海峡及其附近水域维持常态化海军存在，强调航行自由和国际水道开放。据防务部门介绍，多国联合护航编队会使用导弹驱逐舰、护卫舰与补给舰对过境商船实施远程警戒和近距离护航，雷达监控与直升机巡逻也时常出现在该区域。伊朗宣布对海峡实施“通行条件”的动向，被视作对这些外部军事力量的直接挑战，加剧了双方在海上权利和规则解释上的摩擦。
在围绕霍尔木兹海峡局势的讨论中，海湾地区消息人士近日表示，国际社会对这一战略航道能否保持畅通高度关注。多家能源与航运机构指出，任何潜在干扰都可能对全球油气供应预期造成影响。不过据区域媒体早前转引伊朗军方一名高级官员的说法，伊朗方面曾表示“未封锁霍尔木兹海峡”，强调该水道目前仍处开放状态。分析人士认为，后续局势走向仍需结合各方军事部署和外交接触加以观察。
海运保险与大宗商品交易市场对霍尔木兹海峡局势的变化尤为敏感。伦敦等地的保险经纪机构指出，每当伊朗发出可能限制或干预海峡通行的信号，战区附加费和保费就会迅速上调，部分船公司甚至考虑绕行非洲好望角以规避风险。伊朗提出对船只实施登检、通行费与申报制度的说法，使得市场对可能出现船舶被扣押或攻击的极端情形重新定价，油价和运价在短时间内出现明显波动。
区域航运业人士近日表示，连接波斯湾与阿曼湾的霍尔木兹海峡仍是全球能源运输的关键通道之一，大量原油和液化天然气出口需经由此处转运。分析人士指出，该水道在国际原油和天然气贸易中占比较高，对国际市场价格波动具有明显敏感性。多家能源咨询机构称，近期中东紧张局势令各方更加关注该海峡的航行安全与潜在风险，一些船运公司已开始评估航线调整和保险成本变化的可能影响。
中国、欧盟、日本等主要能源进口国对霍尔木兹海峡安全高度关切，因为其原油和天然气供应相当一部分依赖通过该水道的稳定运输。外交渠道中，各方多强调应通过政治与外交方式化解伊朗与西方之间的对立，防止在海峡发生误判或军事碰撞。近年来在联合国及多边会议上，霍尔木兹被多次提到，围绕伊朗是否有权对国际通行船舶施加登检与收费“通行条件”的法律争议，也逐渐成为国际海洋法与地缘政治讨论的焦点。
伊朗围绕霍尔木兹海峡安全的做法中，登检商船一直是备受关注的环节。近年来，地区紧张局势升高时，曾多次出现武装人员乘小艇靠近大型商船或油轮，登船核查船籍、货物申报与航线信息的情况。相关人员介绍，这类登检通常由伊朗海军或革命卫队海军执行，被视为落实其对“可疑船只”检查权的具体体现。在新近流传的“通行条件”说法中，强制登检与威胁扣押、攻击拒不配合的船舶，被认为是最具争议的条款之一。
据多方外交渠道本月上旬消息，美方与以色列同伊朗之间的紧张关系在 2026 年 3 月初再度升温，地区安全形势引发外界持续关注。中东观察人士援引当地媒体报道称，近日曾出现关于以军针对伊朗境内若干目标实施空中打击的说法，相关细节与评估仍待更多官方说明。多国外交官表示，若对抗进一步升级，可能对海湾周边航运和能源供应预期产生影响，市场情绪已有所波动。

#美以伊最新局势#【#以色列宣布袭击伊朗#（十三）：#中方将派特使访问中东# 伊朗军方高官称未封锁霍尔木兹海峡】伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队当地时间3月4日晚宣布，“真实承诺4”第18轮行动已开始，伊朗导弹及无人机再次射向以色列。

15:26:06——【伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队称用导弹击中一艘美国油轮】财联社3月5日 ​​​
据地区安全分析人士近日介绍，围绕伊朗在海湾地区动向的讨论中，多家媒体和智库报告提及伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的相关行动。一些初步报道将导弹与无人机等远程打击手段列为外界关注焦点，称其在地区局势演变中可能扮演重要角色。受访专家表示，目前公开信息多为碎片化披露，具体行动规模与技术参数尚未完全明朗，有关国家的防务部门正密切跟踪形势发展。
在伊朗与海湾阿拉伯国家的复杂关系中，霍尔木兹海峡经常被提及为外交与安全谈判的关键筹码。阿曼长期扮演调解者角色，与伊朗和西方国家保持沟通，以降低在海峡发生直接冲突的可能性。根据地区观察人士的分析，一旦伊朗正式、系统地落实所谓“通行条件”，要求所有过境船只接受其检查与收费，将迫使邻国在能源输出安全、海上合作机制和对伊政策上作出新的权衡。

【#以色列宣布袭击伊朗#（十七）：伊朗称对巴林境内美军驻地的袭击已致多人死伤】
14:15:53——【以军超80架战机空袭伊朗军事及基础设施】财联社3月7日电，以色列国防军宣布，超过80架以色列空军战斗机完成了新一轮打击。本次行动主要针对德黑兰及伊朗中部其他地区的基础设施，以及伊朗西部和中部的多 ​​​
#伊朗打击以色列能源设施#【#以色列宣布袭击伊朗#（二十三）：#特朗普称战争已基本结束# 伊朗提出停火条件】据美国哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）驻白宫记者当地时间3月9日下午在社交媒体发帖称，在一次电话采访中，美国总统特朗普称战争可能很快就会结束。据称特朗普说：“我认为这场战争已经基本结束，差不 ​​​
据联合国及多国媒体近日转述，在中东局势持续紧张的背景下，有关停火安排、冲突走向以及美方对后续局势的公开表态成为国际舆论关注的重点之一。据称，围绕潜在停火窗口和降级机制，不同渠道的消息频繁出现，内容涉及战事节奏、地区盟友立场以及大国之间的政策协调。外交观察人士认为，在信息来源复杂交织的情况下，相关谈判进展仍存在不确定性，外界对未来数周事态变化保持谨慎观望。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post fabricates a detailed 'conditional passage' regulatory framework and specific fee structures for the Strait of Hormuz that are entirely absent from the evidence, which only reports general tensions and an official denial of a blockade.
text_analysis.t1_evidence: The post details a specific 'conditional passage' mechanism with 6 compliance points including 'inspection fees', 'escort coordination fees', and 'blacklist screening' (Section I), but evidence [1] and [2] only mention general concerns about safety and an official statement that the strait is 'not blocked', with no mention of any such regulatory or fee structure.
t1_problematic_subclaims: Iran has launched a 'conditional passage' management mechanism with specific fees and inspection protocols.
Shipping companies are required to pay 'inspection fees' and 'escort coordination fees' to pass the Strait of Hormuz.
text_analysis.t2_evidence: The post claims that 'war risk insurance rates have rapidly risen to 1% or even 3%' and that 'multiple underwriters issued cancellation notices' (Section III.2), whereas evidence [2] only states that shipping companies are 'evaluating... insurance cost changes', significantly exaggerating the certainty and magnitude of the market reaction.
t2_problematic_subclaims: War risk insurance rates have definitively risen to 1-3% and underwriters are cancelling coverage.
The Strait of Hormuz has entered a 'control mode' with dense radio instructions and extended anchorage times.
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The text describes Image 1 as showing 'a merchant ship with a speedboat approaching' and an 'Inspection Team' (Section I, Image 1 caption), but the image description for 01_img_1.jpg explicitly states it shows 'A dramatic photo of a warship firing a missile at night', which semantically contradicts the text's claim of a routine inspection scene.
c1_problematic_subclaims: Image 1 shows a merchant ship being inspected by a speedboat/inspection team.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is highly unreliable, fabricating specific regulatory details and fees for the Strait of Hormuz that do not exist in the evidence, while also misrepresenting the visual content of the accompanying images.

images.scene_description: A US Navy Arleigh Burke-class destroyer (hull number 158, USS Mason) is firing a missile at night. A large grey text box with white Chinese characters is overlaid on the top left of the image.
images.ocr_text: ‘霍尔木兹通行条件公布？航运成本急升’ | 158 | 图源：网络
images.v2_evidence: A large semi-transparent grey banner with the headline text '‘霍尔木兹通行条件公布？航运成本急升’' is digitally overlaid on the top left of the photograph.
images.c_evidence: The image depicts a US Navy warship (USS Mason) firing a missile, whereas the post text and evidence describe Iranian naval forces conducting inspections or enforcing passage conditions in the Strait of Hormuz.
images.explanation: The image is a stock photo of a US warship with a headline overlay, mismatching the post's claim of Iranian enforcement actions.

images.explanation: This is an edited infographic map illustrating the strategic location and proposed control zones, consistent with the post's context.

images.scene_description: A very low-resolution, grainy, and blurry image showing the silhouette of a helicopter flying above a ship in foggy or low-visibility conditions.
images.c_evidence: The image is too indistinct to verify the specific claim of 'IRGC Navy conducting inspections' and lacks the visual clarity of genuine on-site footage described in the evidence.
images.explanation: The image is a generic, low-quality stock photo that does not provide verifiable evidence of the specific event claimed.

images.scene_description: A screenshot of a mobile phone interface displaying a document titled '关于近期特定水域通航安全特别管理的临时规定'. The text lists regulations for shipping, including fees and inspections. The issuing authority is listed as 'XX市海洋与渔业局' (XX City Marine and Fisheries Bureau).
images.ocr_text: 15:30 | 搜索新闻或关键词 | HOT | 政策动态 / 通知公告 | 关于近期特定水域通航安全特别管理的临时规定 | ... | XX市海洋与渔业局 | DATE: 202X年XX月XX日
images.v2_evidence: The image is a fabricated document screenshot using placeholder text 'XX市' (XX City) and '202X年' (Year 202X), indicating it is a template or fake notice rather than a real official document.
images.c_evidence: The document is issued by a generic 'XX City Marine and Fisheries Bureau', which contradicts the post's claim that it is an official notice from Iranian authorities regarding the Strait of Hormuz.
images.explanation: The image is a fake document with placeholder text, falsely presented as an official Iranian regulation.

images.c_evidence: The image is labeled '资料图' (Reference Image) and shows a generic fighter jet, which does not visually corroborate the specific claim of 'new regulations being published' or the specific conflict event described.

image_analysis.global_notes: The post relies heavily on mismatched imagery: a US warship for Iranian enforcement, a fake document with placeholder text for official regulations, and generic stock photos for specific events. The visual evidence contradicts the textual claims in almost every instance.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖虽然借用了真实的地区紧张局势作为背景，但其核心论据——即伊朗已实施具体通行费和管理规定——属于凭空捏造，且作为关键证据的'内部通知截图'实为带有明显占位符的虚假模板，导致整体结论完全失实。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post presents unconfirmed rumors as established facts (T1) and uses visually misleading images (US ship vs Iranian inspection, fake document) to support the claim (V2, C1, C2). The core narrative is false despite the real context of regional tension.
judge.core_claim: 伊朗已正式公布并执行霍尔木兹海峡的‘有条件通行’新规，包括强制登检、缴纳通行费及护航要求，导致航运成本急剧上升。
key_subclaims: 伊朗相关部门已推出并启动一套‘有条件通行’的管理机制，包含登检、缴费、资料预审等具体操作流程。
过峡船舶需缴纳‘检查费、航道服务费、护航协调费’，并需向指定账户支付。
图片1展示了霍尔木兹现场伊方逐船登检的画面。
图片4展示了伊朗官方发布的关于通航安全特别管理的临时规定通知。
航运保险战争险费率已迅速上调至1%甚至3%区间。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 伊朗相关部门已推出并启动一套‘有条件通行’的管理机制，包含登检、缴费、资料预审等具体操作流程。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence states these 'regulations' are circulated texts often viewed as indicators but not confirmed official implementation; the post presents them as established fact.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 过峡船舶需缴纳‘检查费、航道服务费、护航协调费’，并需向指定账户支付。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence describes these fee structures as part of circulated rumors or 'guidance' rather than confirmed official policy.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片1展示了霍尔木兹现场伊方逐船登检的画面。
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 shows a US Navy destroyer (USS Mason, hull 158) firing a missile, not an Iranian inspection team inspecting a merchant ship.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片4展示了伊朗官方发布的关于通航安全特别管理的临时规定通知。
subclaim_findings.note: Image 4 is a fabricated screenshot with placeholder text 'XX City Marine and Fisheries Bureau' and '202X', clearly not an Iranian official document.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 航运保险战争险费率已迅速上调至1%甚至3%区间。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms insurance rates rise and markets are sensitive, but specific figures like 1-3% are not corroborated and may be exaggerated.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post fabricates a specific regulatory framework ('conditional passage', specific fees) that evidence identifies as unconfirmed rumors or circulated texts (T1). It uses heavily edited and mismatched images: a US warship firing a missile is claimed to be Iranian inspections (C1, V2), and a fake document with 'XX City' is presented as an Iranian official notice (C1, V2). The combination of fabricated text details and misleading visual evidence creates a false narrative. With 5 L2 labels including T1 and multiple C/V mismatches, the verdict is Mostly False.

image_findings.explanation: Image shows a US warship firing a missile, but text claims it shows Iranian inspections; large text overlay added.
Infographic map with added labels and arrows illustrating the concept.
Grainy image of helicopter/ship used to imply specific inspection event without evidence.
Fabricated document screenshot with placeholder 'XX City' used as evidence of Iranian regulation.
Stock photo of Iranian jet with added caption linking it to new regulations.
